reason: This is a common Islamic prayer/supplication (dua) that translates to 'O Allah, You are Peace, and from You comes peace, blessed are You, O Owner of Majesty and Honor.' It contains no ISIS-specific content or extremist messaging.
original_post: اللّهُـمَّ أَنْـتَ السَّلامُ ، وَمِـنْكَ السَّلام ، تَبارَكْتَ يا ذا الجَـلالِ وَالإِكْـرام . 349
